creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
I run this port on _lots_ of servers and I don't get this.

Can you confirm you have:
PERL CFLAGS:
-g3 -O0 -fno-strict-aliasing -DDEBUGGING -DDEBUG_LEAKING_SCALARS 
-DDEBUG_LEAKING_SCALARS_FORK_DUMP

httpd2 configure args:
and ./configure --enable-maintainer-mode

I'm not convinced this really has anything to do with mod_perl but 
rather perl.

There is not enough context in the debugging to actually help me such
as the args to the functions.

Also, see here
http://perl.apache.org/docs/2.0/devel/debug/c.html#Analyzing_Dumped_Core_Files



--
